hero.headline:
UI/UX Designer
& AI Engineer
hero.subheadline: I build interfaces that combine thoughtful design with technology. I specialise in design systems, web experiences and AI-powered tools.

projects.section_subtitle: Selected work — design, frontend and AI.

about.title: About
about.body: I'm a UI/UX designer with experience in frontend development and AI tooling. I work at the intersection of design and code — from component systems to AI-powered applications. Trilingual in Spanish, English and French.

contact.title: Contact
contact.subtitle: Have a project in mind? Let's talk.
contact.success_body: Thanks for reaching out. I'll reply within 48 hours.
contact.error_body: Something went wrong. Please try again or email me directly.

footer.made_with: Built with Next.js and Tailwind CSS

meta.home_title: Sareli Santiago García — UI/UX Designer & AI Engineer
meta.home_description: Portfolio of Sareli Santiago García, UI/UX designer and AI engineer specialising in design systems, modern frontend and AI-powered interfaces.
